title: SS Ausonia
summary:
Several ships have shared the name SS Ausonia:

SS Ausonia (1883), sunk by a torpedo attack in 1917
SS Ausonia, previously SS Catania (1894) from 1894 to 1904, sunk by torpedo attack in 1917
SS Ausonia (1909), formerly SS Tortona, owned by the Cunard Line from 1911 to 1918
SS Ausonia (1914) — see German aircraft carrier I
SS Ausonia (1956) — see SS Ivory
text:
Several ships have shared the name SS Ausonia:

SS Ausonia (1883), sunk by a torpedo attack in 1917
SS Ausonia, previously SS Catania (1894) from 1894 to 1904, sunk by torpedo attack in 1917
SS Ausonia (1909), formerly SS Tortona, owned by the Cunard Line from 1911 to 1918
SS Ausonia (1914) — see German aircraft carrier I
SS Ausonia (1956) — see SS Ivory
